title: Upgrade vulnerable npm dependencies
description: npm audit after npm ci reports 10 vulnerabilities, including high-severity advisories affecting next 16.2.5 and transitive build/lint dependencies plus moderate next-intl advisories. Evaluate the safe dependency upgrade path, especially Next 16.2.10+ and next-intl 4.13.1+, update package.json/package-lock.json, and rerun lint/build/audit.
acceptance_criteria: npm audit --audit-level=moderate passes or remaining advisories are explicitly documented as non-runtime/accepted; npm run lint passes; npm run build passes; package.json and package-lock.json stay in sync.
close_reason: Applied in PR #22: media description, VideoObject JSON-LD, skip link, postcss override (audit 5→0)

title: Media page metadata, VideoObject JSON-LD, skip-to-content link
description: SEO/a11y follow-ups from improvement review: localized generateMetadata for /media (currently inherits homepage title/description), VideoObject structured data for the media videos, and a visually-hidden skip-to-content link for keyboard users.
close_reason: Applied in PR #22: media description, VideoObject JSON-LD, skip link, postcss override (audit 5→0)

title: Polish Greek page presentation
description: Review and improve the Greek locale presentation where the page currently does not look good. Focus on typography, spacing, line wrapping, locale-specific visual balance, and obvious Greek text/layout issues without changing unrelated content or routes.
acceptance_criteria: Greek homepage and media page look balanced at desktop and mobile sizes; long Greek strings do not feel cramped or awkward; English page is not regressed; lint/build pass.
close_reason: The Noto Serif Greek typography work (font swap, hero/nav locale tuning) was adopted, reconciled, and merged in PR #16. Further polish can be filed as a new bead.

title: Enable static rendering for locale routes
description: The production build currently reports /[locale] and /[locale]/media as dynamic server-rendered routes even though this is a static portfolio. src/app/[locale]/layout.tsx defines generateStaticParams but does not call next-intl's setRequestLocale(locale) before getMessages/translation APIs. Add the next-intl static-rendering hook in the locale layout and any page/layout that needs it, then confirm next build reports the locale routes as static/prerendered where expected.
acceptance_criteria: next-intl locale is validated and passed to setRequestLocale before getMessages or translations; npm run build passes; build route summary no longer marks the static portfolio locale pages dynamic unless a documented reason remains.
close_reason: Already done: setRequestLocale + generateStaticParams in place; build outputs /[locale] and /[locale]/media as SSG (verified in every recent build)

title: Review codebase for defects and risks
description: Perform a read-only review of the current conductor portfolio codebase. Focus on runtime defects, i18n/routing issues, build or deployment risks, accessibility/SEO problems, and missing validation. Produce findings with file and line anchors, and create follow-up beads for actionable defects if needed.
acceptance_criteria: Review covers app routing/layouts, i18n config/messages, conductor data, core components, styling, package/build configuration, and current working tree state; findings are reported with file:line anchors; any actionable follow-up work is captured in Beads.
notes: Review completed read-only. Validated with npm ci, npm run lint, npm run build with network for next/font, npm audit --audit-level=moderate, npm outdated, production server probes, route/status checks, rendered metadata checks, repo-wide stale-content searches, and source review across routing, layouts, i18n, data, components, CSS, docs, and package config. Findings filed as conductor-portfolio-93a, conductor-portfolio-68a, conductor-portfolio-b2q, conductor-portfolio-24b, conductor-portfolio-kvs, conductor-portfolio-8kk. Existing conductor-portfolio-55g remains open for requested name-change sweep.
close_reason: Read-only codebase review completed; findings reported and follow-up beads filed.

title: Change conductor name to Vaggelis Stavropoulos everywhere
description: Update every displayed and metadata reference to the conductor's name so it consistently uses the requested name: vaggelis stavropoulos. Scope includes English and Greek conductor data, page metadata, navigation/hero/contact/media copy, image alt text, structured text in messages, and any repo-owned docs or config where the public-facing name appears. Preserve existing i18n flow and verify with a repository-wide search before closing.
acceptance_criteria: All public-facing name references use the requested name consistently; both en and el content layers are updated where applicable; repository-wide search finds no stale public-facing old-name references; npm run build passes.
close_reason: Complete: renamed in PR #9 (data files, monogram), last doc reference in PR #13. Greek pages intentionally use the Greek script (Βαγγέλης Σταυρόπουλος); the Latin-name variant for el was reviewed and reverted in PR #16 to avoid mixed-script alt text.

title: Set up Beads workflow
description: Ensure the repository Beads workspace is usable for future sessions: verify config, install Git hook shims, confirm issue export, and document any remaining local caveats.
notes: Setup validation: bd ping ok; hooks list shows all five shims installed via core.hooksPath; export.auto/path/git-add explicit in .beads/config.yaml; federation status reaches git+https://github.com/evangstav/portfolio-website.git. Caveat: bd config validate/drift include server/federation checks that do not map cleanly to this embedded-mode git+https setup; bd dolt test is unsupported in embedded mode.
close_reason: Beads workspace configured and validated: hooks installed through core.hooksPath, JSONL export enabled and explicit, remote reachability verified, and setup caveats documented.

title: Refresh stale real-content design note
description: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-05-real-content-design.md still says Evangelos Stavropoulos, evang.stavropoulos@gmail.com, no videos, and a pending YouTube URL. The live content now uses Vaggelis Stavropoulos, vagstav97@hotmail.com, a YouTube channel link, and one video entry. Update or supersede the note so future agents do not reintroduce old assumptions.
acceptance_criteria: The design note no longer contradicts current live data for name, email, social/video state, or media-page defaults; repository-wide search confirms no stale public-facing old-name/email guidance remains except intentionally historical references.
close_reason: Spec refreshed 2026-07-12: bio/form/domain state corrected, stale pending list replaced

title: Keep public URL metadata explicit for deployments
description: src/lib/siteUrl.ts falls back to http://localhost:3000 when NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL and VERCEL_URL are absent. Local production probes therefore emit localhost in canonical links, sitemap, robots.txt, and Person JSON-LD. Add an explicit production guard or deployment check so non-local production cannot publish localhost metadata by accident, while preserving a convenient local fallback.
acceptance_criteria: Production builds/deploys fail fast or clearly warn when no public site URL is configured outside local development; sitemap, robots.txt, canonical URLs, and JSON-LD use the intended public origin; npm run build passes.
close_reason: NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL=https://vaggelisstavropoulos.com set in Vercel (production+preview) via CLI; takes effect on next deployment

title: Add focus trapping to media dialogs
description: VideoModal and MediaDialog focus the close button and handle Escape, but they do not trap Tab focus or make background content inert while the modal is open. Keyboard users can tab into controls behind the modal even though role=dialog and aria-modal=true claim modal behavior. Add a lightweight focus trap/inert handling pattern shared by the video and image dialogs.
acceptance_criteria: Tab and Shift+Tab stay within the open media dialog; Escape still closes; focus returns to the trigger; background content is not reachable to assistive tech while the dialog is open; npm run lint and npm run build pass.
close_reason: Already done: useModalA11y traps Tab (first/last cycling), closes on Escape, restores focus to trigger, and locks body scroll; used by VideoModal and MediaDialog

title: Localize media dialog accessibility labels
description: The media lightbox/dialog has hardcoded English aria labels: Previous image, Next image, Close, and Close video. These labels are exposed on Greek pages and bypass the message catalog. Move them into messages/en.json and messages/el.json, use next-intl in both media dialogs, and keep visual behavior unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: No hardcoded English dialog control labels remain in src/app/[locale]/media/MediaGallery.tsx or src/components/Videos.tsx; both en and el message files contain the labels; npm run lint and npm run build pass.
close_reason: Close/Close video/Previous image/Next image labels moved to messages/{en,el}.json and consumed via next-intl. PR #14, merged.
